g.text: Bit flip | Cosmic rays, failing RAM, ECC memory errors
Partial write | Power loss during write() syscall
Media degradation | Bad sectors on aging disk
Controller error | Disk firmware bugs, cable issues

g.text: ║ CORRUPTION SHOULDN'T HALT THE ENTIRE BROKER ║
║ • Skip the bad entry with a warning ║
║ • Continue recovery from next valid entry ║
║ • Operators can investigate corrupted data later ║
║ • Partial data is better than no data ║
